description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, graal, and bundle. In the build stage add a compile job using the maven:3-jdk-8 image that runs `mvn help:evaluate -Dexpression=project.version`, sets `MOSC_VERSION` from the output, writes it to mosc_version.txt, echoes the version, then runs `mvn compile` and `mvn package`, and stores mosc_version.txt and the generated JARs as artifacts for 30 days. In the graal stage add a graal job using the oracle/graalvm-ce:1.0.0-rc13 image with a before_script `yum install -y upx`, depends on compile, runs `export MOSC_VERSION=$(cat mosc_version.txt)`, echoes the version, executes `native-image --static -H:IncludeResources="reports/.*\.json$" -H:ReflectionConfigurationFiles=src/main/resources/graal_reflection_config.json -jar target/motorscript-compiler-$MOSC_VERSION.jar`, then `strip motorscript-compiler-$MOSC_VERSION` and `upx -9 motorscript-compiler-$MOSC_VERSION`, and publishes the resulting binary as an artifact for 30 days. In the bundle stage add a bundle job using the alpine:3.8 image that depends on compile and graal, runs `export MOSC_VERSION=$(cat mosc_version.txt)`, echoes the version, creates `bin/any` and `bin/linux-amd64` directories, copies the original and compiled JARs from target into `bin/any/` and the native binary into `bin/linux-amd64/`, and stores those paths as artifacts for 30 days. Also in the build stage add a pages job using the python:3.7 image that runs a before_script `pip install mkdocs`, then `mkdocs build --site-dir public` and gzips HTML, text, JS, and CSS files under public, publishing the public directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
